'''Teril Nyl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the wife of [[Darca Nyl]]. She was considered beautiful. She died from complications after giving birth to their son [[Neas Nyl|Neas]].<ref name="Tales21" />
